UG-47  ACCESS AND INSPECTION OPENINGS — EXEMPTIONS. (a) Vessels of the following types are exempt from the inspection opening requirements of UG-46: (1) vessels not exceeding 12 in. inside diameter; (2) vessels where corrosion is negligible and contents are nontoxic. (b) Vessels exempted under (a) shall still be tested as required by UG-99 or UG-100. (c) When inspection openings are omitted, the Manufacturer shall document the exemption basis in accordance with UG-120. For guidance on corrosion considerations, see also UG-25. The Inspector shall verify the exemption per UG-93.
